calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-10-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:51am
Judge Pro Tem Richard Grotch, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Edward O'Reilly appears through his business partner Fiachra O'Shaunessy, appearing in pro per. Respondent Richard Edmon Gilbert II appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Grotch.

Mr. O'Shaunessy is unable to represent Mr. O'Reilly, appeal is dismissed.

9:54am

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-21-2011 Judgment Entered
